title: poecilopteris heteroclita
intro: Poecilopteris heteroclita, also known as the spotted fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poecilopteris heteroclita include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this fern are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
